mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, password_hash, password_algo, password_version, password_updated_at, need_reset, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_auth.auth_password WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_auth.auth_password SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_algo = 'BCrypt', password_version = #{passwordVersion}, password_updated_at = #{now}, need_reset = 0, updated_at = #{now} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
